description: Reference pipeline: returns normalized FIFA metadata for the video. Proves the job contract end-to-end.
Snapshot of playback analytics (views, watch time, completion rate, per-decile drop-off).
YOLOv8 + ByteTrack player detection/tracking with team color clustering; outputs per-track boxes + a pitch heatmap.
Match-result model (Dixon-Coles/Poisson) + xT/VAEP value metrics from public event data. Video-independent estimate.
PEAR SMPLX human-mesh recovery per tracked player; derives camera-space kinematics. Requires an NVIDIA GPU.
Per-player body-part usage (MediaPipe Pose) over screen time — the data behind the stock-market UI. Fast, no GPU.
Full scene: per-player body-part usage + a TRANSPARENT PEAR mesh-overlay video to layer over the highlight. Adds the 'analytics available' tag.
